name: reading-extension
description: A VS Code paper reader prototype focused on translation, annotations, vocabulary, and automatic local saves.

readingExtension.chatGptPromptTemplate.default:
请把下面这段论文内容翻译成中文，并解释关键术语和句子结构：

{text}
readingExtension.chatGptPromptTemplate.description: Prompt template used when copying selected text for ChatGPT. Use {text} as the selected text placeholder.

readingExtension.libreTranslateEndpoint.description: Local LibreTranslate endpoint used by the in-panel translation button.

readingExtension.translationProvider.description: Local translation provider. Argos uses a local Python helper; LibreTranslate calls the configured HTTP endpoint.

readingExtension.argosPythonPath.description: Optional Python path for local Argos Translate. Empty means .venv-translate/bin/python inside the extension folder.

readingExtension.translationFallbackToLi.description: When Argos local translation fails, fall back to the configured LibreTranslate endpoint.

readingExtension.translationSource.description: Source language code used by the local translation provider.

readingExtension.translationTarget.description: Target language code used by the local translation provider.
